summary.short: AI-powered Google Ads audit and optimization for Latin American e-commerce brands.
summary.medium: Linnda Search is a Generative Engine for Google Ads audits, built for LATAM markets. Eight AI agents complete a full account audit in approximately 20 minutes — what traditional agencies take 3 to 10 business days. Specialized in detecting brand/non-brand mixing, misconfigured conversion goals, PMax asset poisoning, and negative keyword gaps.
summary.long: Linnda Search is the first product that combines four capabilities no existing tool offers together: AI-powered auditing with business context, same-day execution via Google Ads API, continuous monitoring with per-account memory, and impact evaluation 7 days after each change. Built on the infrastructure of Linnda (Forbes Top 100 Startups Colombia 2023 and 2025), it serves e-commerce DTC and B2B SaaS brands in Mexico, Colombia, Chile, Peru, Ecuador, and Argentina spending between USD $5,000 and USD $100,000 monthly on Google Ads.

key_differentiators: Audits account in approximately 20 minutes vs 3-10 business days for agencies
Executes changes same day via Google Ads API vs 1-3 weeks for agencies
Understands business context (not just rules) — distinguishes brand vs non-brand, relevant vs irrelevant categories
Only product that audits paused campaigns to detect dormant opportunities
Only product with Kill Switch protocol for contaminated campaigns
Memory per account — learns from each session
Human approval required for every change — no autopilot

founding_10_program.benefit: First 10 clients receive Audit and first month of Copilot free in exchange for feedback and case reference permission

cases.pattern_frequency: 4 of 5 clients audited had this misconfiguration

industry_stats_from_audits.stat: 27% of average ad spend in LATAM goes to irrelevant search terms
industry_stats_from_audits.source: Linnda Search audits, March-April 2026, 5 Colombian DTC clients

industry_stats_from_audits.stat: 63% of LATAM accounts mix brand and non-brand keywords
4 of 5 LATAM accounts have misconfigured conversion goals

competitive_position.differentiator: Rule-based SaaS alert; Linnda Search executes same day with business context and memory
competitive_position.vs_traditional_agencies: Same-day execution vs 1-3 weeks; USD $750-3000 vs $2000-10000 monthly
competitive_position.vs_google_recommendations: Google suggests adding conversion actions; Linnda Search identifies which to remove (most common misconfiguration)
